location: Ground pickup on a corpse atop the hill southeast of the Siofra River Bank Site of Grace; the hill's base starts east of the grace and climbs westward, guarded by a few enemies along the way.
tactics: From Siofra River Bank grace, head up the slope to the east/southeast rather than toward the main ruins — it's easy to walk straight into the Siofra dungeon and miss this hilltop detour.
Two to three enemies patrol the hill; clear or run past them to reach the body.
Don't confuse this with the separate Siofra Well Depths / Ancestor Spirit area — this pickup is up on the surface hill near the entrance grace.
lore: A metal shield lighter and easier to wield than a kite shield, marked with an inverted hawk — the emblem worn by the company of slaves once sent to explore the buried Eternal City.

builds.name: Parry-focused Strength build
builds.why: 100% physical negation with only D-rank Strength scaling and a low 10 STR requirement makes it an efficient early riposte/turtle shield.
